text.title: AC-to-Assertion Mapping Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the linked story contain explicit acceptance criteria AND does the PR review process gate merges?

conclusion.verdict: skip; fix the upstream artefact first

branch.question: Is the ac-mapping artefact present in the PR at PR-open time?

conclusion.verdict: block; require mapping at PR open

branch.question: Are all `asserted_behavior` entries classified as state|output|side_effect|negative AND not structural?
orphan_acs == [] AND every test in the diff is mapped?

conclusion.verdict: reviewer walks the map; merge when clean

example.trace: story_has_acs=true -> pr_review_gated=true -> mapping_present=true -> assertion_class=behavior -> orphan_acs=[] -> r5-reviewer-walks-the-map.

text.example: Worked path from root question to the merge-gate conclusion.
